arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners suffer Dusan Vlahovic blow amid £67m Benjamin Sesko dilemma
arts.sum: Arsenal have less than two weeks to bolster Mikel Arteta's squad before the January transfer window closes, with the Gunners being urged to sign a new striker amid their fading Premier League title hopes

arts.ttl: Spurs transfer news: RB Leipzig, 'half of Europe' in race for Southampton star
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur reportedly face the prospect of competing with 'half of Europe' to win the race for Southampton star Tyler Dibling.

arts.ttl: Wolves transfer news: Move for Sporting Lisbon wide player being considered by Vitor Pereira?
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers are allegedly giving consideration to making an approach for a Sporting Lisbon winger before the end of the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: RB Leipzig ready to pay €30m for Southampton’s Tyler Dibling
arts.sum: RB Leipzig have joined the race to sign Southampton’s Tyler Dibling (18) and, according to Florian Plettenberg, the Bundesliga side are ready to pay €30m for the Englishman. But Southampton…

arts.ttl: RB Leipzig vs. Sporting Lisbon: UEFA Champions League probable teams, match stats and LIVE blog!
arts.sum: RB Leipzig play host to Sporting Lisbon looking to get their first points of the UEFA Champions League's league phase on Wednesday (kick-off: 6.45pm CET). João Pereira lasted only eight games in the job, but his replacment, Rui Borges, has performed well since his arrival, winning three of his five matches to maintain Sporting's position at the summit of Portuguese football.

arts.ttl: Tuesday's Transfer Talk Update: Jermaine Pennant, Viktor Gyokeres, Andrey Santos
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: 10 Champions League talking points as Liverpool eye history and Jurgen Klopp wants revenge
arts.sum: The Champions League returns on Tuesday after more than a month, with Liverpool currently leading the way and Manchester City at risk of missing out on the knockout stages

arts.ttl: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Gyokeres TRUTH, Sesko SAGA, Isak THREAT, Chelsea INTEREST
arts.sum: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Gyokeres TRUTH, Sesko SAGA, Isak THREAT, Chelsea INTEREST The season-ending injury to Gabriel Jesus has convinced Mikel Arteta that he needs to take action and Arsenal have been busy enquiring about potential options over the past week or so.

arts.ttl: Arsenal given Viktor Gyokeres transfer approval as Mikel Arteta sent Alexander Isak message
arts.sum: Ex-Arsenal winger Jermaine Pennant believes that the Gunners should be prioritising a move for Sporting Lisbon's Viktor Gyokeres over Newcastle United's Alexander Isak.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Newcastle continue Gyokeres push amid Isak fear
arts.sum: Regarding Gyokeres, we have also once again been made aware that a move to Man Utd is highly unlikely as things stand despite the fact that the striker has an excellent relationship with Ruben Amorim. EXCLUSIVE: Newcastle continue Gyokeres push amid Isak fear
